issue_class: Review unwanted AI crawlers with AI Labyrinth
subject: startingmonday.app
startingmonday.app
recommended_action: Toggle Bot Fight Mode on. You can see bot-related actions by going to Security > Events. Any requests challenged by this product will be labeled Bot Fight Mode in the Service field. This allows you to observe, analyze, and follow trends in your bot traffic over time.

subject: startingmonday.app
insight: Security.txt not configured. Configure and manage the Security.txt file to improve the website's vulnerability disclosure process
detection_method: We evaluated the Security Settings configured for this domain and found that Security.txt is not enabled.
risk: The absence of Security.txt insights creates a lack of a clear, accessible method for researchers to report vulnerabilities. This can lead to security issues going unnoticed or under-reported, increasing the risk of exploitation.

subject: _domainconnect.startingmonday.app
insight: Domains without "Always Use HTTPS". HTTP requests to your host do not redirect to the equivalent HTTPS request.
detection_method: We've made an HTTP request on port 80 and received a response, but the response was not a 301 redirect to the corresponding HTTPS URL.
recommended_action: Enable Always Use HTTPS. Enable Always Use HTTPS in your zone's Cloudflare SSL/TLS Edge Certificates settings.

subject: _domainconnect.startingmonday.app
insight: Domains without HSTS. HTTP Strict Transport Security is a header which allows a website to specify and enforce security policy in client web browsers. This policy enforcement protects secure websites from downgrade attacks, SSL stripping, and cookie hijacking.
detection_method: We have made HTTP and HTTPS requests to your hostname to check for the presence of the Strict-Transport-Security header in the response. We have not detected the correct header in the response.
recommended_action: Enable HSTS. Enable HSTS in your zone's Cloudflare SSL/TLS Edge Certificates settings.

subject: _domainconnect.startingmonday.app
insight: Domains missing TLS Encryption. We have detected that there is no TLS encryption for this host.
detection_method: Your host accepts HTTP connections on port 80 but does not accept HTTPS connections on port 443. As a result, we have determined that you do not have TLS encryption set up for this host.
recommended_action: Set up TLS encryption for your host. Update the SSL/TLS encryption mode to Full (strict) for this zone.
